reviews.comment:
Precio más que elevados a mí entender y no veo la razón de no dejar acampar mínimamente a la noche .carísimo hasta para un termo de agua caliente..

(Translated by Google)
The prices are exorbitant in my opinion, and I don't see the reason for not allowing at least some camping overnight. It's incredibly expensive, even for a thermos of hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMVlpMV93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio en la mitad de la nada. Excelente atención, no funcionaba la aplicación de YPF, e igual me hicieron el descuento por ser socio del ACA. Conviene cargar nafta allí, porque hasta Puerto Madryn o Comodoro Rivadavia, no hay más estaciones.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station in the middle of nowhere. Excellent service; the YPF app wasn't working, but they still gave me the discount for being an ACA member. It's worth filling up there, because there aren't any other stations until Puerto Madryn or Comodoro Rivadavia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMnZfQnB3RRAB
